case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. SARA LACROSSE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACROSSE, SARA , AN INDIVIDUAL $1,486.31 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $313.65 INTEREST, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,479.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
